meta.title: SectorCalc — Free & premium sector calculators
meta.description: Cost, scrap, margin, energy, routing, construction and operations calculators in one sector-focused platform.

hero.headline: Run your business calculations faster and more accurately
hero.subtitle: SectorCalc brings cost, scrap, margin, energy, routing, construction, finance and operations calculations into one sector-focused platform.

categories.title: Browse by calculation area
categories.subtitle: Pick the type of cost, measurement or decision you need first.

costMargin.title: Cost & Margin
costMargin.description: Margin, break-even, unit cost and pricing checks.

scrapOee.title: Scrap & OEE
scrapOee.description: Scrap rate, material loss, setup time and shop-floor efficiency.

energyCarbon.title: Energy & Carbon
energyCarbon.description: kWh cost, peak load, carbon footprint and compliance exposure.

routingLogistics.title: Routing & Logistics
routingLogistics.description: Route cost, fuel, freight and delivery margin.

constructionField.title: Construction & Field
constructionField.description: Concrete, roofing, paint, area and project quantity estimates.

financeBusiness.title: Finance & Business
financeBusiness.description: Loans, payroll, tax, cash flow and everyday business math.

dailyPractical.title: Daily Practical
dailyPractical.description: Household, travel, tip and everyday decision calculators.

premium.title: Premium Calculators
premium.description: Deeper inputs, scenario comparison and export-ready decision summaries.

popular.title: Most used calculators
popular.subtitle: Reach the calculation tools businesses need most often.

freePremium.title: Basic calculations are free. Deeper decision summaries are premium.

why.title: Why SectorCalc instead of scattered Excel files?

unify.title: One place for scattered calculations
unify.text: Stop rebuilding the same formulas across notebooks, chats and spreadsheets.

discover.title: Find the right sector tool faster
discover.text: Browse by cost, scrap, energy, routing or industry instead of guessing.

upgrade.title: Move from free checks to premium summaries
upgrade.text: Start with a quick number, then open deeper decision output when stakes rise.

mission.title: Uncalculated cost is often invisible loss.
mission.text: Many businesses still run quote, scrap, labor, energy, transport and margin math across separate files or rough estimates. SectorCalc is built to make those calculations more visible, comparable and repeatable.
